metadata.name: Match Text with Regular Expressions
metadata.description: Use regular expressions to efficiently search for text in log files and configuration files
objectives: Efficiently search for text in log files and configuration files

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Server with httpd service for regex practice

tasks.name: Verify httpd log file was created
tasks.description: The /tmp/httpd.log file should exist with grep output
hints: Create the log file: grep httpd /var/log/messages > /tmp/httpd.log
Run as root: sudo grep httpd /var/log/messages > /tmp/httpd.log

tasks.name: Verify httpd log file contains httpd entries
tasks.description: The log file should contain httpd-related log entries
hints: The log file should contain lines matching 'httpd' from /var/log/messages
